text: Kentucky Derby 2026: Cherie DeVaux makes history as Golden Tempo wins after late surge - BBC

text: Washington mother's final moments captured on horrific 911 call: "He's got a gun!" - CBS News
fullText: Gloria Choi and her friends called Lakewood, Washington, 911 four times in 48 hours to report her being stalked by an ex-boyfriend. Two days later, he ran her off the road and riddled her truck with bullets as she was on the line with a 911 dispatcher.

text: Joel Embiid’s big night, Boston’s missed 3s help 76ers complete 3-1 comeback, take series - NBC Sports
fullText: Philadelphia beat Boston in a series for the first time since 1982, and it was the first time the 76ers ever came from 3-1 down to win.

text: Germany says U.S. troop withdrawal ‘anticipated', Spain and Italy could be next - NPR
fullText: Germany's defense minister is playing down the impact of the Pentagon's decision to pull 5,000 troops from the country, but the move has rattled NATO allies and added to growing fears that Europe can no longer rely on Washington.

text: How the Voting Rights Act reshaped Black representation in Congress - The Washington Post
